title: EVA React Hook
description: A custom React hook in the EVA codebase

id.description: camelCase hook identifier (without 'use' prefix in id for uniqueness but include it in label)

repo_path.description: Relative path from eva-foundation root to the hook file

repo_line.description: 1-based line of the hook function declaration

service.description: Service id for the app/layer this hook lives in

calls_endpoints.description: Endpoint ids this hook fetches from

returns.description: TypeScript type ids returned by this hook

used_by_screens.description: Screen ids that consume this hook

data_type.description: Primary TypeScript type id for the data returned
